title: Min-wage bite-ratio disemployment — DATA GAP
subtitle: 3 of 3 required primary state-panel series not yet fetched. Stratified Callaway-Sant'Anna DiD on US-state bite-ratio cohorts cannot be estimated; OECD cross-country bite-ratio fallback is also absent.

y_axis.label: ATT differential (HIGH - LOW bite cohorts), pp teen E/P

annotations.label: Pre-registered SUPPORTED threshold: ATT_high − ATT_low ≤ -0.020 pp with p<0.10. REFUTED if differential ≥ 0 at p<0.10 OR |differential| < +0.005 pp with sufficient power.
